claims.statement: Panama Canal length is at least 4× larger than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Panama Canal length: 82 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: Brisk walking is slower than Cheetah sprint.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Brisk walking: 5 km/h. Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h.

claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 9× longer than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: There are more strings on a violin than UN member states.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 4 strings vs 193 states.

claims.statement: Telephone patented happened before Barcode first scanned.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Telephone patented: 1876. Barcode first scanned: 1974.
